title: Pin Items to Top of a Group
excerpt: It would be great if you could pin an item to the top of a group so that regardless of how all the other items on that group get sorted (by date, name, etc) a pinned item would always stay at the top of a group for quick…

posts.author: remawhirter (Rachel Mawhirter)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if you could pin an item to the top of a group so that regardless of how all the other items on that group get sorted (by date, name, etc) a pinned item would always stay at the top of a group for quick reference.

posts.author: fcollay (Faye Collay)
posts.cookedHtml: 100% agree! This would be super helpful
